name: @metorial/eventzilla
description: Manage events, tickets, registrations, and attendees on the Eventzilla event ticketing platform. Retrieve event details, ticket configurations, and categories. Process end-to-end registrations through a multi-step checkout flow including preparing, creating, filling, and confirming orders. Manage attendees by retrieving details and checking in or reverting check-ins via barcode. Look up transactions by checkout ID or order reference. Confirm or cancel existing orders. Retrieve organizer and sub-organizer account details. Publish or unpublish event sale pages.
